HGSS.1680.0018:
Listen, listen!\f
I entered the drawing on the sixth
floor of the Goldenrod Department\r
Store.\f
For $300, you have a chance to
receive a TM. It’s a great deal!\f
But I tried ten times and all I got was
Berries! I don’t think I’m lucky\r
enough to win a top prize.\f
OK, I’ll call you later!
